summary: Recording is painfully slow and needs speed correction; no musical highlights are noted.
review: The sole reviewer finds the tape running at a sluggish pace, stating it must be sped up to be listenable. No comments about the band's performance or specific songs are provided, leaving the show quality undefined. Overall the recording is considered poor due to its speed issue.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly critical review (0 stars) focusing on playback speed; no positive aspects mentioned for either performance or audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Playback is too slow, described as 'slo‑mo dead'; reviewer suggests the recording needs to be sped up.
